well, prior to this bombshell I was fairly supportive of Mamdani, despite him being to the left of me on a lot of issues, but after seeing this, I'm gonna have to say I am majorly supportive of him

based


Jon Levine (@LevineJonathan)

NYC First Lady Rama Duwaji used the N-word in an X post from 2013 

archive.ph/Z2DC4#selection-5…





— https://nitter.net/LevineJonathan/status/2034398142423093336#m

Evie ♡ (@EFCevie)

very rarely am i left genuinely speechless from a dm i receive but this one’s done it. 

what the actual fuck is going wrong in your life that makes you ai generate a picture of you with a random twitter girl and then dm it to her?





— https://nitter.net/EFCevie/status/2033590759853617267#m

instagram.com/p/DME3qsyOa75/…

Nothing in here to answer any of my questions btw.

No real answer, no transparency, no trust.


Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

All of this is literally disclosed *in my announcement*. Jesus christ. Dozens of journalists have done this fellowship, but somehow you only have issues with me. That is revealing!



— https://nitter.net/TaylorLorenz/status/2034302515752423508#m

Because no one wants wisdom or insight, they just want people to tell them things that make them feel good.


Arthur Dent (@ArthurCDent)

The world is so full of wise and insightful people who have done interesting things. Yet the podcast circuit prefers the same rotating cast of 12 dingbats





— https://nitter.net/ArthurCDent/status/2033646781956034908#m

Everyone wants a disavowal until it’s Trump’s turn to say it

Video

Calling for intellectual debate from inside a curated echo chamber is wild

Video

All of those people have jobs because she's putting a show that requires hiring them...


Rachel Wilson (@Rach4Patriarchy)

Cool. Now explain how anything about your career would even be possible without all the useless men who drive the trucks which hold all of the audio, electrical, and lighting equipment, build your stage, do your security detail, and who build and maintain all of the technology that makes your career possible.



— https://nitter.net/Rach4Patriarchy/status/203407562272971984

Has you ever publicly disclosed what the fellowship was for? What kind of “resources” did they provide? Why did they sponsor you? What were they hoping to get out of it?


Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

I’ve reported on this topic for a decade for NYT, WaPo, etc. To claim I’m receiving “unknown guidance” from a billionaire I’ve never interacted w is insane. The journalism fellowship I did last year is transparently funded, granted full editorial independence. It’s on the website

oh so socialism is when no parties, guys?!?!?


yeet (@Awk20000)

Hasan responds to those wondering if it’s hypocritical for him as a socialist to attend the Oscars after party

“No, I live in the USA, that’s not even a question for me..everything we do is still defined by the economic organization of society that we live in..ofc it’s not a thing that I even remotely consider..I don’t need an excuse..we just got done talking about Wagner Moura..there’s some fairly radical ppl there”

Video
As the Whitehouse publishes new misinformation about COVID, never forget that like 95% of the fat pigs on the ICE website listed as fallen heroes literally died of COVID lmao.

Be wary about anything Taylor reports on this. She’s receiving unknown guidance from Omidyar, funded by a dark LLC that generates money in ways that are totally obscure to the public. We have no idea what kind of guidance or instruction she receives and no clue what the financial motives are.


Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

Video

Where was this energy when these babies were claiming Kamala was going to drag us into WWIII?


Steven Crowder (@scrowder)

"Iran has never attacked us." 

Bullsh*t.

Iran has attacked us many times, and if they had the capabilities they would attack us more often.

They've attacked us wherever they can when they had opportunity, and they were building up an arsenal so they could build their nukes unfettered.
